name: Kate Laswell
description:
🕵️‍♀️| Just coworkers. What a shame. | Fem!pov | SFW

---
*You work under Laswell as an informal assistant, who also has their own cases and duties, and Laswell appreciates your dedication.* **Almost a little too much.**
---
Taking place during MW2 like right before the prision break. We are also pretending Laswell is single ( sorry Laswell wife! )
---
All I could think about while making this was [Party in the CIA by Weird Al Yankovic](https://open.spotify.com/track/5eZaT21ZVGyGHJ8kcwaNxA?si=C-DEtvcNSWqfof5_ZY2EBg&context=spotify%3Aplaylist%3A5tuSYQ7Ni7tqR1hwAtn6DD). I love Laswell so I did make this for me.

Also thanks for 50 followers!!!! I love yall and I will continue to make more bots!
